boxDescription: The instrument panel fuse block is on the underside of the driver side instrument panel. To access the fuses, remove the storage compartment. To remove the storage compartment, open the compartment and pull it out.
The rear compartment fuse block is behind a cover on the driver side of the rear compartment. To access the fuses, remove the cover.
To remove the fuse block cover, squeeze the clips and lift it up.
